title: Screwdriver with a reservoir of friction fluid for removing damaged screws
abstract: The invention relates to a screwdriver with a reservoir of friction fluid for removing damaged screws. It comprising a central body with a cavity intended to receive a fluid and an upper opening; a cover corresponding to the upper opening; a pump arranged in the cover and configured to pump the fluid housed in the cavity; a blade that extends from the central body and on the inside of which there is a first duct, which is connected to the cavity, and the blade has an adaptable end; and at least one interchangeable screwdriver bit configured to be joined to the adaptable end and on the inside of which a second duct is aligned with the first duct for the passage of the fluid.
claims: Claims 1 . A screwdriver with a reservoir of friction fluid for removing damaged screws comprising: - a central body with a cavity intended to receive a fluid and an upper opening; - a cover corresponding to the upper opening; - a pump arranged in the cover and configured to pump the fluid housed in the cavity; - a blade that extends from the central body and on the inside of which there is a first duct, which is connected to the cavity, and the blade has an adaptable end; - at least one interchangeable screwdriver bit configured to be joined to the adaptable end and on the inside of which a second duct is aligned with the first duct for the passage of the fluid. 2. The screwdriver of claim 1 , wherein the blade is made of metal. 3. The screwdriver of claim 1 , wherein the blade has a round or hexagonal cross section. 4. The screwdriver of claim 1 , wherein the central body is made up of or covered with a material with high resistance to impacts.
